translations.en: a short, fat, rosy-cheeked man with long hair covering his eyes.
translations.zh: 一位身材矮胖、臉頰紅潤、長髮遮眼的男子。

translations.en: "He--hello, $G. Nice to see thee again."
translations.zh: 「哈、哈囉，$G。再次見到汝甚是高興。」

translations.en: The man seems afraid of you. "Wh-what do you want?"
translations.zh: 此人看起來有些怕汝。「你、你要什麼？」

translations.en: As faint as a whisper comes the word "Le'nard."
translations.zh: 輕如耳語，他說出「勒納德」這個名字。

translations.en: "I'm a @tailor, $G."
translations.zh: 「吾是@裁縫師，$G。」

translations.en: He looks around, then waves goodbye.
translations.zh: 他四下張望，然後揮手告別。

translations.en: "I sew @pants, @tunics and @dresses, $G. I use a lot of @thread."
translations.zh: 「吾縫製@褲子、@短上衣和@洋裝，$G。吾需要大量@線。」

translations.en: He stands still for a moment and then shrugs.
translations.zh: 他靜止了一會兒，然後聳聳肩。

translations.en: "Who?"
translations.zh: 「哪位？」

translations.en: "Oh, sorry. I thought thou wanted to buy something."
translations.zh: 「哦，抱歉。吾以為汝要購買東西。」

translations.en: "I'm sorry, but I really don't think $Y can carry that."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，吾真的不認為 $Y 能帶走那個。」

translations.en: "I'm sorry, but I really don't think $Y can afford that."
translations.zh: 「抱歉，吾真的不認為 $Y 負擔得起那個。」

translations.en: "That costs #5. Do you still want it?"
translations.zh: 「那個需 #5 枚金幣。汝還要嗎？」

translations.en: $N takes $Y's gold and hands over the purchase.
translations.zh: $N 收下 $Y 的金幣，遞出購買的物品。

translations.en: "I'm terribly sorry, but I can't sell it for less!"
translations.zh: 「非常抱歉，但吾不能賣更便宜！」

translations.en: "I'm sorry! That's
translations.zh: 「抱歉！那個

translations.en: still
translations.zh: 還是

translations.en: too expensive, isn't it? Here, I'll sell it for #5 gold, okay?"
translations.zh: 太貴了，對嗎？好吧，吾以 #5 枚金幣賣給汝，好嗎？」

translations.en: "But - but none of you has any thread to sell."
translations.zh: 「但、但汝等無人有線可賣。」

translations.en: "Which of you?"
translations.zh: 「汝等哪一位？」

translations.en: $N turns to $Y, and says "Will you take 8 gold for that thread?"
translations.zh: $N 轉向 $Y，說道：「汝願以 8 枚金幣賣那線給吾嗎？」

translations.en: "Good, good." He hands $Y 8 gold pieces and takes the thread.
translations.zh: 「好，好。」他給了 $Y 8 枚金幣，取走了線。

translations.en: "Oh. Okay."
translations.zh: 「哦。好吧。」

translations.en: "I'm not sure what you mean."
translations.zh: 「吾不確定汝的意思。」

translations.en: "I wouldn't know where to begin. Ask @Marissa in Paws."
translations.zh: 「吾不知從何說起。去帕斯找@瑪麗莎吧。」

translator_notes: 勒納德是個膽怯的裁縫師，語氣帶口吃（He--hello, Wh-what）。以重複字頭模擬口吃效果。向玩家購買線的對話是重要 quest 機制。Marissa 在 Paws 是相關 NPC。
